title: atriplex hastata var. littoralis
intro: Atriplex hastata var. littoralis, also known as saltbush, is a type of shrub or small tree that is native to salt marshes and coastal areas. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its high levels of antioxidants and flavonoids. The health benefits of Atriplex hastata var. littoralis include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Atriplex hastata var. littoralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
